problem.title: Single Source Shortest Path using Dijkstra’s Algorithm
problem.description:
Problem Statement
Find shortest distances from source vertex in a weighted graph with non-negative weights.

Input Format
n m
u v w
source

Output Format
Distances to all vertices.

Sample Input
5 6
1 2 2
1 3 4
2 3 1
2 4 7
3 5 3
4 5 1
1

Sample Output
0 2 3 9 6

Explanation
Shortest distances computed via priority queue.

solution.explanation: Uses O(n^2) Dijkstra with an adjacency matrix, updating distances and marking visited vertices.
